title: Finely Crafted Title
description: This resource pack changes the title of the main menu for my modpack Finely Crafted.
body:
![FC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9f59c4c22229cfb2590ba5eb1fde14dfdc242b9.png)

This resource pack changes the title of the main menu for my modpack Finely Crafted.

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

### NOTICE
This resource pack is specifically made for my modpacks:\
**[Finely Crafted: CTS](https://modrinth.com/modpack/finely-crafted-cts)**\
**[Finely Crafted: TCA](https://modrinth.com/modpack/finely-crafted-tca)**

which is why it is only available for versions 1.21.8 & 1.21.10
